name: brila
description: Brila public-API skills: generate a published website from a Google Maps or Yelp listing (live URL + Markdown), edit and manage a site (sections, images, custom domains, delete), and build embeddable reviews widgets.

interface.shortDescription: Generate & manage published websites from Google Maps or Yelp listings
interface.longDescription: Skills from the makers of Brila, the AI-native website builder. Generate a published site from a Google Maps or Yelp listing (live URL + Markdown), edit its sections, upload images, attach a custom domain, list/delete sites, and build embeddable reviews widgets — via the Brila public API.
defaultPrompt: Generate a Brila site from this Google Maps or Yelp link and give me the live URL + Markdown.
Build a reviews widget from my Brila site for my Shopify store.
